category_sources: source_facts.description says "GNOME document viewer"; source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME Apps page https://apps.gnome.org/Evince/.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is evince; official GNOME app page at https://apps.gnome.org/Evince/ uses the display name Evince.
docs_sources: GNOME Help at https://help.gnome.org/users/evince/stable/ is the official user documentation; https://apps.gnome.org/Evince/ is the official app page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; GNOME project sources are hosted at the official GNOME GitLab URL https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/evince, also referenced by GNOME mirror metadata.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GNOME document viewer; official GNOME documentation at https://help.gnome.org/users/evince/stable/ documents Evince as a document viewer.
